description: Steal a valuable artifact from a heavily guarded museum using stealth and cunning.
Trade fire-based items with another player to gain new abilities.
Yank a 10-second memory out of a foes head as a glowing silk ribbon; wear it as a scarf to gain their skill bonus until it frays at sunrise.
Shatter a reflective surface; each shard flies to a wounded ally, sealing cuts with quicksilver scars that grant +1 AC but echo enemy voices.
Channel storm energy into your weapon for a single strike that deals extra lightning damage and may stun the target.
Temporarily gain the resilience of a nearby ally, increasing your health
Call down a brief meteor shower that peppers a small area with radiant damage, risking friendly fire for massive payoff.
Spin your pocket watch charm and rewind your last 6 seconds, undoing your wounds but also resetting your position.
Split into three afterimages that confuse enemies; for one round, attacks against you have disadvantage.
Roots erupt from the ground, restraining foes and slowly draining their stamina into the land.
